alerts.news: Andy Reid confirmed Xavier Worthy will be the primary deep threat in 2026, calling him 'the fastest player I've ever coached.'
alerts.impact: With Hollywood Brown gone and Royals slotting into WR2, Worthy's target share should spike. Already rostered but extension-worthy at current salary.

alerts.news: Eagles released Kenneth Gainwell, opening the RB2 role behind Saquon Barkley. Bo Mitchell is the only back left on the roster under 26.
alerts.impact: Low-cost lottery ticket. If Barkley misses time, Mitchell becomes a league-winner at minimum bid. Worth a speculative add.

2025.name: Royals, Jalen
2025.news: Second consecutive day of WR2 reps in OTAs. Chemistry with Mahomes building.

2024.name: Coleman, Keon
2024.news: Keon Coleman caught 8 passes for 142 yards in joint practice with the Dolphins.

generalNews.headline: Panthers trade DJ Moore to Chargers for 2027 2nd-round pick
generalNews.summary: DJ Moore heads to LA to pair with Justin Herbert. Moore was underutilized in Carolina's run-first scheme. Could regain WR1 value alongside Ladd McConkey.

generalNews.headline: Updated 2026 NFL draft order projection after free agency
generalNews.summary: Post-free-agency mock draft has WR-heavy first round. Five receivers projected in top 15. Dynasty rookie draft values may shift.

strategicNotes.text: DJ Moore trade reshuffles Chargers WR room. McConkey remains WR1 but Moore could eat into target share. Monitor Moore's salary in TheLeague — if he's still cheap, he's a buy.
Eagles RB depth is paper-thin after Gainwell release. If Barkley misses any time, Mitchell becomes a must-start. File under 'free insurance policies.'
